# Wrench.ai Claude Code Plugins

> Official Claude Code plugin marketplace from Wrench.ai — B2B intelligence, revenue operations, and engineering quality skills.

## Overview

This repository is the official Wrench.ai plugin marketplace for Claude Code. It contains 14 production-ready skills installable via `/plugin marketplace add github:WrenchAI/wrench-plugins`.

Wrench.ai is a B2B intelligence and personalization platform. It provides predictive lead scoring (183% more accurate than CRM scores), persona matching, contact enrichment, and AI-powered outreach for revenue teams.

## Installation

Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add github:WrenchAI/wrench-plugins`
Install a skill: `/plugin install <skill-name>@wrench-plugins`

## Available Skills

- wrench-personalize: Persona-based B2B personalization — archetype identification, meta-measure stack, positioning layer, and message variants. Includes worked example using the military/veteran buyer segment. Standalone or Wrench.ai-powered.
- wrench-dossier: Contact intelligence brief plus voice-adaptive message drafts. Paste any data about a contact and get a scannable brief plus outreach ready to send. Adapts to sender voice and audience type (C-suite, champion, practitioner).
- wrench-report: Sales intelligence reports — Competitive 360 (competitor positioning and battle cards), Brand Insights (persona resonance), or Lead Scoring CRM Report (ranked pipeline). HTML artifact output. Standalone or live Wrench.ai data.
- wrench-charts: Brand-compliant Recharts chart generation for React — chart type selection, color tokens, custom tooltips
- feature-spec: Complete feature specs with acceptance criteria, task breakdown, and Cypress test plan
- bug-audit: Release audit covering functional bugs, UX bugs, test coverage gaps, and customer-surfaced issues — produces HOLD/SHIP/CLEAR decision
- wrench-de-review: Data engineering PR review — idempotency, dedup, cardinality assertions, schema contracts, error handling
- wrench-ux-constitution: UX governance — 11 design principles, Six Pillars, Seven Empirical Gaps, pre-ship checklist
- wrench-outreach: B2B outreach sequences (email + LinkedIn) — multi-step, persona-specific, direct voice
- meeting-dossier: Pre-meeting intelligence brief using Wrench.ai lead score and enrichment data
- dossier-builder: Contact intelligence dossier — Wrench.ai signals rendered as a scannable HTML artifact
- humanizer: Removes AI writing patterns — strips hedging, filler phrases, and corporate-speak
- seo-audit: Comprehensive SEO audit — technical, on-page, Core Web Vitals, indexing, structured data
- page-cro: Conversion rate optimization for marketing pages — hero, CTA, social proof, bounce rate

## Wrench.ai MCP Server

The Wrench.ai MCP server (Model Context Protocol) gives Claude direct access to workspace data: lead scores, contact enrichment, persona distributions, campaign analytics, competitor intelligence.

MCP endpoint: https://api.v2.wrench.ai/mcp/sse
Auth: x-api-key header (get key at https://web.wrench.ai/api-key)

Works with: Claude Code, Claude.ai, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible client.

## Source

Skills are synced from wrench-dna (https://github.com/WrenchAI/wrench-dna), Wrench.ai's internal standards repository.

## Links

- Website: https://wrench.ai
- API docs: https://api.v2.wrench.ai/docs
- Workspace: https://web.wrench.ai
- wrench-dna (standards): https://github.com/WrenchAI/wrench-dna
- Internal plugins: https://github.com/WrenchAI/wrench-plugins-internal
